name: vault
description: Hybrid knowledge vault for Claude Code — auto-archives sessions into an Obsidian-compatible wiki, split between a global (~/claude-vault/) vault and per-project (docs/vault/) vaults. At session start, vault context (index, project entity, recent sessions) is automatically injected so Claude can reference past decisions and lessons without re-discovering them. Builds on the LLM-Wiki pattern by Selma Kocabıyık.

hooks.command: python3 -c "import pathlib,subprocess,sys; p=pathlib.Path('${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}')/'scripts'/'vault-context.py'; subprocess.run([sys.executable,str(p)]) if p.exists() else None"
